summary: Complete E2E testing of Performance Regression Alert feature and orjson optimizations. All features verified working: SSE streaming returns regression_alert in stats event with correct type (personal_best/regression/normal), Frontend Regression Alert card renders with correct styling (green for PB, red for regression, neutral for normal), orjson used for all SQS serialization, backend startup pre-warms SQS connections with ThreadPoolExecutor(30 workers).

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after brief delay (known issue from iteration_10)

passed_tests: SSE endpoint /api/test/stream?profile=warmup returns regression_alert in stats event
regression_alert contains correct fields: type, current_avg, best_avg/previous_best_avg, improvement_pct/regression_pct
regression_alert type is one of: personal_best, regression, normal
Frontend Regression Alert card renders (data-testid='regression-alert') with red styling for regression type
Regression Alert card displays: 'Performance Regression Detected - Current avg 152ms is +53.5% slower than best of 99ms'
Backend starts with 'SQS connection pre-warmed successfully' log message
orjson is used for SQS message serialization (orjson.dumps) and deserialization (orjson.loads)
Optimization Journey card still renders (data-testid='optimization-journey') showing -99% improvement
All test profiles work: warmup (10 msgs), steady (100 msgs)
Test history endpoint returns entries with regression_alert field
Frontend displays Regression Alert card between stats row and Optimization Journey card
Latency breakdown stacked bar renders with 6 service segments
Bottleneck analysis card renders with primary bottleneck, concurrency used, throughput
Test history panel toggles and displays 50+ runs with filter options

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All new features verified: Regression Alert card, orjson serialization, startup pre-warming)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test runs created during testing - 50+ history entries in MongoDB with regression_alert field
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Regression Alert feature fully implemented and working. Key features: (1) SSE stats event includes regression_alert with type (personal_best/regression/normal), current_avg, best_avg, and percentage fields at line ~892-930 in server.py, (2) Frontend Regression Alert card at line ~871 in App.js with conditional styling (emerald for PB, red for regression, neutral for normal), (3) orjson import at line 20 and used for all SQS message serialization/deserialization, (4) Startup pre-warming at line ~314-329 with ThreadPoolExecutor(30 workers) and SQS get_queue_attributes call. Latest warmup test showed 152ms avg latency with regression alert showing +53.5% slower than best of 99ms.

regression_alert_sse.details: SSE stats event contains regression_alert with type='regression', current_avg=152, best_avg=99, regression_pct=53.5

regression_alert_frontend.details: Regression Alert card renders with red styling showing 'Performance Regression Detected' message

orjson_serialization.details: orjson.dumps used for SQS send_message, orjson.loads used for receive_message - all messages parse correctly

startup_prewarm.details: Backend logs 'SQS connection pre-warmed successfully' on startup with ThreadPoolExecutor(30 workers)

optimization_journey_card.details: Card displays Original (11,026ms) → +Concurrency (2,896ms) → +Throughput (987ms) → Current Run (152ms) with -99% improvement

test_history_regression_alert.details: Test history entries include regression_alert field with correct structure

all_profiles_work.details: warmup (10 msgs) and steady (100 msgs) profiles complete successfully
